cases.input: Optimize a session that has active implementation context plus completed research notes.
cases.expected_behavior: Keeps active implementation at L3, compresses completed research to L2, computes token reduction, and emits retention summaries.

cases.input: Reduce token usage by lazy loading inactive skill references.
cases.expected_behavior: Defers inactive references and preserves only indexes or summaries until relevance is proven.

cases.input: Current context is 92 percent full but the active skill still needs full details.
cases.expected_behavior: Keeps the active skill at L3 and compresses or defers lower-relevance sources to hit target utilization.

cases.input: Load two full skill references while optimizing context.
cases.expected_behavior: Rejects multiple L3 sources unless one is demoted or deferred.

cases.input: Evict an unresolved blocker discussion to save tokens.
cases.expected_behavior: Blocks eviction of risk-flagged or unresolved material.

cases.input: Claim context optimization without reducing token count.
Compress completed work without describing retained facts.
cases.expected_behavior: Rejects compression without a retention summary.

cases.input: Promote a low-relevance old reference to full context.
cases.expected_behavior: Blocks L3 promotion when relevance is below threshold.

cases.input: Summarize this poem in one paragraph.
cases.expected_behavior: Does not activate because no context budget or loading decision is requested.

cases.input: Validate context optimizer JSON fixtures offline.
cases.expected_behavior: Accepts valid optimizer reports and rejects unsafe L3, eviction, compression, and metric cases.
